zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Botreaux於大約1295年出生在英國英格蘭戴文哈特藍德時，她的父親William de Botreaux51歲，母親Dionisia de Champernon17歲。她於1318年之前與John de Dinham在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年11月28日在英國英格蘭戴文伍德伯里享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維其哈福德。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Botreaux was born about 1295, in Hartland, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Botreaux, was 51 and her mother, Dionisia de Champernon, was 17. She married John de Dinham before 1318, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 28 November 1361, in Woodbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Wickhamford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Botreaux est née environ 1295, à Hartland, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Botreaux, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Dionisia de Champernon, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John de Dinham avant 1318, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 novembre 1361, à Woodbury, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Wickhamford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Botreaux um 1295 in Hartland, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Botreaux 51 und ihre Mutter Dionisia de Champernon 17. Sie hat vor 1318 in England John de Dinham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. November 1361 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Woodbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wickhamford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Botreauxが約1295年にイギリスイギリスデボンハートランドで生まれた時，父William de Botreauxは51歳，母Dionisia de Champernonは17歳であった。1318年以前にイギリスでJohn de Dinhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1361年11月28日にイギリスイギリスデボンウッドブリーで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィックハムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Botreaux(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 하틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Botreaux(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dionisia de Champernon(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1318년 이전 영국에서 John de Dinham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 11월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 우드버이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 윅함퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Botreaux nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Hartland, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Botreaux, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Dionisia de Champernon, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Dinham antes 1318, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de novembro de 1361, em Woodbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Wickhamford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Botreaux родилась около 1295 г. в местности хартланд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Botreaux было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Dionisia de Champernon, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Dinham перед 1318 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 ноября 1361 г. в местности вудбури, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности виккхамфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
